71.name: poor_mans_shield
71.lore: A busted old shield that seems to block more than it should.

abilities.title: Damage Block
abilities.description:
Gives a 100% chance to block 30 damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and 20 damage on ranged.

Has a 50% chance to block damage from creeps.

292.name: desolator_2
292.lore: The original demonic favorite that served as basis for the beloved mortal design.

abilities.title: Greater Corruption
abilities.description: Your attacks reduce the target's armor by -13 for 7 seconds.

326.name: spider_legs
326.lore: A horrifying yet useful mixture of necromancy and artificing.

abilities.title: Skitter
abilities.description: Grants you 20% bonus movement speed, 50% improved turn rate, and free pathing for 10 seconds. Walking over trees causes them to be destroyed.

359.name: essence_ring
359.lore: An ancient bauble blessed by the breath of Verodicia.

abilities.title: Life Essence
abilities.description: Increases your current and max health by 240 for 10 seconds.

370.name: demonicon
370.lore: A record of the final reckoning. With one page torn out.

abilities.title: Greater Demonic Summoning
abilities.description: Summon 2 demonic warriors and 2 demonic archers that last 65 seconds. The Warrior burns mana every hit, reveals invisible units, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. The Archer has a basic dispel ability with a slow and a passive movement speed aura.

371.name: fallen_sky
371.lore: One of the few surviving creations of the acolytes of the Wyrmforge.

abilities.title: Fallen Sky
abilities.description:
Transform into a meteor that strikes down at the target area after 1 seconds in a 315 AoE, stunning enemies for 1.6 seconds and dealing impact damage. Continues to deal damage every 1 seconds to enemy units and buildings for 6 seconds.

Building Impact Damage: 75 
Building Over Time Damage: 60 

Non-Building Impact Damage: 150 
Non-Building Over Time Damage: 60

Fallen Sky cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.

377.name: minotaur_horn
377.lore: The trophy from a mighty beast ambushed and slain in the recesses of its own home.

abilities.title: Lesser Avatar
abilities.description:
Applies a basic dispel. Grants 50% Magic resistance and immunity to pure and reflected damage for 2s. For the duration of the effect, any negative effect from enemy spells has no effect.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

565.name: chipped_vest
565.lore: It doesn't look like much, but it's oddly comfy.

abilities.title: Chipper
abilities.description: Every time you are attacked, you return 30 damage to heroes and 20 damage to creeps.

675.name: psychic_headband
675.lore: A failed experiment in finer telekinetic control, still fit for other ends.

abilities.title: Psychic Push
abilities.description: Pushes the target unit away from you 400 distance.

840.name: pogo_stick
840.lore: An antique plaything found in the ruins of an Ozenja circus bazaar.

abilities.title: Vault
abilities.description: Propels your hero forward 300 units. Tumbler's Toy gets disabled for 3 seconds if its owner receives damage from a player source.

947.name: occult_bracelet
947.lore: A band that bears effigy of the dark goddess Eloshar's unsleeping eye.

abilities.title: Rites of Eloshar
abilities.description: Each time the wearer is attacked, they gain a stack of 0.4 mana regen, up to 5 stacks. Stacks last for 5 seconds.

abilities.title: Reciprocity
abilities.description: When attacked, the hero counter-attacks a target within their attack range for 80% of their regular attack damage.

1158.name: whisper_of_the_dread
1158.lore: The air that passes through this amulet makes a dreadful sound.

abilities.title: Tunnel Vision
abilities.description: Equipped Hero has their daytime vision reduced by 15% but their Spell damage increased by 10%.

abilities.title: Reverberate
abilities.description: After taking 180 damage from any source, the wearer fires a projectile at up to 2 random enemies in a 600 radius, prioritizing heroes, that deal 110 physical damage and slow the targets movement and attack speed by 100% for 0.2s.

1598.name: unrelenting_eye
1598.lore: A serpent's eye the size of a melon (and just as moist).

abilities.title: Relentless
abilities.description: Increases slow resistance by 50%. This bonus is reduced by 10% for every enemy hero within the wearer's attack radius.

1599.name: mana_draught
1599.lore: A refreshing drink best shared with friends.

abilities.title: Bottoms Up
abilities.description:
Restores 70 + 3% of the caster's maximum mana over 6 seconds. If the hero is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

Hold Control to use on an allied hero.

abilities.title: Fill Up
abilities.description: Cooldown Speed of Mana Draught is increased by 30% while in water.

1601.name: crippling_crossbow
1601.lore: The ever-weeping woodgrain of this crossbow coats every bolt in a potent but short-lived narcotic sap.

abilities.title: Hobble
abilities.description: Hits an enemy for 75 damage, then slows them by 80% and reduces Health Restoration by 40% for 4 seconds. The slow gradually fades over the duration of the spell.

1603.name: gunpowder_gauntlets
1603.lore: A 'harmless' prank that went entirely too far.

abilities.title: Beat the Crowd
abilities.description: Your next attack deals an additional 120 magic damage and splashes to units within 250 units for 50% of the original attack's damage plus the additional magic damage.

1604.name: searing_signet
1604.lore: To torture a magic user, one must devise means far beyond the mundane.

abilities.title: Burn Through
abilities.description: Instances of magic damage from spells over 55 ignites enemies, causing them to take 90 magic damage over 6 seconds. Burn damage against non-hero targets is decreased by 50%.

1605.name: serrated_shiv
1605.lore: Too dangerous for taskwork, this blade's only purpose is vile murder.

abilities.title: Gut 'Em
abilities.description: Attacks have a 20% chance to have True Strike and deal 8% of the target's current health as bonus physical damage. Deals a flat bonus of 200 against Roshan.

1606.name: polliwog_charm
1606.lore: A tiny trinket that wriggles when wet.

abilities.title: Ribbit
abilities.description: Increases the health regeneration of a target ally by 8 for 14 seconds. While standing in water, the blessed unit also moves 10% faster.

1637.name: kobold_cup
1637.lore: The Kobold King will sip when he damn well pleases.

abilities.title: One for the Road
abilities.description: Increases movement speed of all allied units in a radius around the caster.

1638.name: dormant_curio
1638.lore: Everyone has an idea, but no one has a clue.

abilities.title: Hidden Potential
abilities.description: Neutral Artifacts you craft while holding a Dormant Curio have their potency increased by 30%.

1640.name: jidi_pollen_bag
1640.lore: Very dangerous. Very difficult to obtain more.

abilities.title: Pollinate
abilities.description: Spreads pollen on all nearby enemy units, decreasing their health restoration and dealing damage over time based on their maximum health.

1642.name: dezun_bloodrite
1642.lore: The gateway to a lost lineage of power, unlocked only with blood.

abilities.title: Blood Invocation
abilities.description: Spells have a 16% larger Area of Effect, but now additionally cost health equal to 35% of their mana cost.

abilities.title: Crushing Blow
abilities.description: Empowers the next attack to be a critical hit. Hitting an enemy with an empowered attack temporarily decreases their movement speed, attack speed, and cast speed.

1644.name: divine_regalia
1644.lore: So magnificent, it cannot abide failure.

abilities.title: Exalted
abilities.description: Increases outgoing damage by 20%. Dying permanently disables this Neutral Item and the current Enchantment is lost.

abilities.title: Loaded
abilities.description: When calculating your base damage or creep bounty from last hits, the value is computed 2 times and the highest value is taken.

abilities.title: Shield Wall
abilities.description: Reduce your own movement speed by 12 to provide a 140 physical damage barrier to all friendly player-controlled units in a 800 unit radius. Lasts for 6 seconds.

abilities.title: Refract
abilities.description: Spend 10% of your current health to create a full health illusion that lasts for 20 seconds. The illusion has 50% outgoing damage and takes 240% of incoming damage.

abilities.title: Pupate
abilities.description: Enter into an insect form for 4 seconds, increasing magic resistance by 35% and movement speed by 15%. While an insect, your size is decreased and your armor is reduced by 45%.

abilities.title: False Flight
abilities.description: Gain 50% slow resistance, phased movement, and 25% evasion for 5 seconds.

abilities.title: Bloodthirst
abilities.description: Gain 15% base damage and 30 attack speed for 6 seconds.

abilities.title: Bloodrush
abilities.description: Enemy heroes dying within 1200 units reset the cooldown of Bloodthirst.

abilities.title: Boldness
abilities.description: Grants 20 attack speed as long as there are enemy heroes within 1200 units.
